---
title: "Hi there!"
image: heyard_rachel.jpg
format: 
  html:
    toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rachel-heyard-3145aa91/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rachelHey
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Rachel Heyard
      href: mailto:rachel.heyard@uzh.ch
---

::: {#hero-heading} 
# Rachel Heyard, PhD

Senior Researcher at [Center for Reproducible Science and Research Synthesis](https://www.crs.uzh.ch/en.html) at the University of Zurich  
Director Meta-Science and Research at [FORRT](https://forrt.org/) (Framework for Open and Reproducible Research Training)  
Vice-president of the [Swiss Statistical Society](https://stat.ch/en/)  
Core team member of the [MERRI](https://merricollaboration.github.io/) (MEta-Research for Research Improvement) Collaboration  

_Meta-researcher, Open Science Enthusiast, Reproducible Science Trainer, Statistician_

Cyclist, Book and Coffee lover, Studying _Italiano_

Swiss based 🇨🇭 - from Luxembourg 🇱🇺

:::
